response:
Phase one needs ten hours while phase two takes twenty
Phase three requires forty hours and phase four takes eighty
Phase five uses one hundred sixty hours to finish the work
Total hours sum to three hundred ten as planned before
Time for each step grows by half again due to issues
New duration for the whole project is thirty weeks now
This shift changes the schedule but not the order of steps
Teams must adjust their efforts to meet the new target
Resources are still split as per the original strict plan
No delays in sequence occur even with the added time
The manager keeps control through tight oversight of all
Every group knows their task and when it must end
Such discipline helps avoid chaos when things go wrong
Fortune favors those who adapt quickly to sudden change
The project will succeed if everyone stays focused and calm
